title: nephromeria axillaris var. obtusifoliola
intro: Nephromeria axillaris var. obtusifoliola, also known as a variety of Nephromeria, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Nephromeria axillaris var. obtusifoliola have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and roots are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness their medicinal and health benefits.
